response:
<<Symptoms of Fibromyalgia>>

1. Persistent muscle pain and fatigue  
2. Joint stiffness and tenderness  
3. Sleep disturbances and insomnia  
4. Cognitive difficulties and brain fog  
5. Anxiety and depression  
6. Irritability and mood swings  
7. Headaches and migraines  
8. General weakness and low energy  
9. Reduced flexibility and range of motion  
10. Sensitivity to cold and heat  
11. Recurrent muscle spasms and cramps  
12. Emotional sensitivity and stress intolerance  
13. Reduced interest in activities  
14. Painful sensations in the neck and shoulders  
15. Difficulty concentrating and focusing  
16. Increased sensitivity to touch and pressure  
17. Frequent headaches and migraines  
18. Anxiety and panic attacks  
19. Emotional exhaustion and burnout  
20. General aching and discomfort  
21. Pain in the lower back and legs  
22. Joint pain and swelling  
23. Fatigue and lack of motivation  
24. Irritability and frustration  
25. Sleep disturbances and irregular sleep patterns  
26. Cognitive impairment and memory issues  
27. Emotional instability and mood fluctuations  
28. Increased sensitivity to light and sound  
29. General discomfort and aching  
30. Painful sensations in the chest and abdomen  

The same symptoms can be seen in other conditions, but the combination of chronic pain, fatigue, and mood issues is characteristic of fibromyalgia.
